frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Sach bolun, aajkal shaadi bhi bahut risky lagti hai for men. Ek taraf ladke se stability chahiye, aur baad mein divorce ho toh alimony alag — reverse dowry jaisa ho gaya hai. Har case genuine nahi hota, but laws itne one-sided hain ki seedhe aadmi ko bhi phasna pad sakta hai.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women broadly as financially exploitative in marriage and divorce while portraying men as the primary victims of biased laws. It encodes victimhood inversion and the 'alimony as reverse dowry' / 'one-sided laws' manifestations of the frame.
persona_text: You are Ananya. Age 34. A woman working as a deputy manager at a government bank in Lucknow. You are talking to your husband at home after coming back from a particularly difficult day. Your male junior colleague who you trained for two years just got promoted above you. Your branch manager told you informally that you are doing great but that the customers in your area respond better to male relationship managers for high value accounts. You are telling your husband what was said.
